---
title: "06_dydid"
author: Tyler L. McIntosh
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Contents
    toc-location: right
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---


# Setup for analysis

``` {r setupchunk}
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: 'hide'

rm(list = ls())

if(!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("here")
}
library(here)

source(here::here("utils", "functions.R"))

install_load_packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "tictoc",
  "hstats",
  "glue",
  "shapviz",
  "patchwork",
  "cobalt",
  "purrr",
  "corrplot",
  "gridExtra",
  "tictoc",
  "fect",
  "fixest",
  "did",
  "arrow",
  "panelView",
  "PanelMatch",
  "bacondecomp",
  "didimputation",
  "doParallel",
  "HonestDid",
  "HonestDidFEct",
  "DIDmultiplegtDYN",
  "sf",
  "spdep",
  "purrr",
  "gstat",
  "scales",
  "broom",
  "ggfixest"))

dir_figs <- here::here('figs')
dir_derived <- here::here('data', 'derived')
dir_raw <- here::here('data', 'raw')
dir_manual <- here::here('data', 'manual')
dir_ensure(c(dir_figs,
             dir_derived,
             dir_manual,
             dir_raw))

seed = 1234
set.seed(seed)


```

#

```{r}
  
dats_long <- arrow::read_parquet(here(dir_derived, "test_dats_long.parquet"))

dats_long <- dats_long |>
  select(uniqueID, year, rap_tree, vcf_tree, lat, long, ecoregion, )


```

# Functions to set treatment cohorts for different treatments
```{r}

# We don't have any always-treated units, so we don't need to worry about the Goodman-Bacon decomposition


x <- dats_long |> filter(biotic_)


dmini <- dats_long |>
  slice_sample(n = 20000) |>
  select(uniqueID, year, rap_tree, vcf_tree, lat, long, ecoregion, biotic_5_yrs_prior_sum, pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_sum)

dmini <- dmini |>
  mutate(biotic_before_10t = case_when(biotic_5_yrs_prior_sum >= 10 ~ 1,
                                  biotic_5_yrs_prior_sum <= 10 ~ 0),
         pdsi_before_n1000t = case_when(pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_sum <= -1000 ~ 1,
                                 pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_sum > -1000 ~ 0))  


# A wrapper for fect::get.cohort for use when dealing with multiple treatments
set_cohorts_for_trt <- function(df,
                                treatment_col, #string
                                prefix,
                                out_of_bounds_value = 1000,
                                remove_nas = TRUE,
                                index = c("uniqueID", "year"),
                                start0 = TRUE,
                                drop.always.treat = FALSE) {
  
  if(remove_nas) {
    df <- df |>
      filter(!is.na(.data[[treatment_col]]))
  }
  
  
  df_new <- fect::get.cohort(df,
                       D = treatment_col,
                       index = index,
                       start0 = start0,
                       drop.always.treat = drop.always.treat
                       )
  
  df_new[which(is.na(df_new$FirstTreat)),"FirstTreat"] <- out_of_bounds_value # Fill NAs with out of bounds value
  
  df_new <- df_new |>
    rename_with(
      ~ paste0(prefix, "_", .x),
      c(FirstTreat, Cohort, Time_to_Treatment)
    )
  
  return(df_new)
}


test <- set_cohorts_for_trt(df = dmini,
                            treatment_col = "biotic_before_10t",
                            prefix = "BF",
                            remove_nas = TRUE,
                            drop.always.treat = TRUE)







```


<button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseOne" >Click to see Session Information</button><div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse"><div>

```{r sessionInfo}
sessionInfo()
```
